sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method: calculate optimal f from arithmetic mean HPR and variance of HPRs sampled over fixed time periods (days/weeks/months/quarters/years) rather than per-trade HPRs when trading multiple systems with Non-Invested Capital included

source_rule_text: When using multiple market systems with NIC (Non-Invested Capital), use arithmetic average HPR and variance in HPRs calculated over fixed time periods rather than individual trades to determine optimal f for position sizing.
